sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet and PCB manufacturing specification for BLUE_XDAQ_MODULE REV.02.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports approval and manufacturing control for PCB material, layer stack, dimensions, plating, finish, markings, and RoHS application.
keyPoints: PCB material is FR-4, 1.6 T, 12 layer, H/H oz.
Board size is 1 PCS 60 mm x 60 mm ± 0.2 mm with 2 x 2 KIT and 4 x 4 PCS array.
Surface finish is Immersion Gold with Ni 4μm and Au 0.03μm plating.
ROHS applied; Gerber date listed as 2024년 10월 28일.

concepts.name: FR-4 PCB material
concepts.evidence: 재질 : FR-4 , 1.6 T , 12 LAYER , H/H oz

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for BLUE_XDAQ_MODULE REV.02.
The PCB material specification is FR-4, 1.6 T, 12 layer, H/H oz.
evidence.evidenceText: 1. 재질 : FR-4 , 1.6 T , 12 LAYER , H/H oz

evidence.claim: The manufacturing specification identifies ITEQ as the selected maker.
The PCB is a 12-layer multilayer board.
The external dimension is 60 mm x 60 mm ± 0.2 mm per piece.
evidence.evidenceText: 6. 외 형 치 수: 1 PCS 60 mm x 60 mm ± 0.2 mm

evidence.claim: The surface finish selected is Immersion Gold.
Plating includes Cu 25 μm +/-20%, Ni 4μm, and Au 0.03μm.
evidence.evidenceText: 7. 도 금(PLATING) : ■ Cu 25 μm +/-20% ... ■ Ni 4μm ■ Au 0.03μm

evidence.claim: RoHS is applied and the Gerber date is 2024-10-28.
The manufacturing department line shows (주)이오닉스 제조사업부 and date 2025-08-25.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
The source contains multiple dates: approval sheet date 2025-08-23, manufacturing department date 2025-08-25, and Gerber date 2024-10-28.
OCR/text quality includes minor misspellings or extraction artifacts such as TIHCK and BULE.
